templates.name: Pure Pins
templates.description: The whole engine in one line: camera depth pushes a wall of pins toward you. Twist one knob and watch yourself emerge in relief.

stickies.text: Raw sensor depth, no ML - just light per pin
Depth pulls pins toward you - Z=0 is the wall
30k pins default - crank density once it feels good

templates.name: Color by Depth
templates.description: Near pins glow one color, far pins another, with a full gradient between. The same depth field drives both position and paint.

stickies.text: One depth field, two jobs - height and hue
Palettes are swappable - the mapping stays
Shift the bias to slide colors along your body

templates.name: Audio Pulse
templates.description: Every pin swells with the bass from your mic. One wire from sound to size is all it takes.

stickies.text: Bass is one number - broadcast to every pin
Signals run on CPU per frame, fields run on GPU
Play music near the phone, then hum low

templates.name: Wave Grid
templates.description: Rings travel outward across the grid while an LFO breathes their height. No camera needed - this one is pure synthesis.

stickies.text: Distance-from-center math - per pin, no simulation
Multiply is a VCA: the LFO scales the whole wave
No source node - pins can run without a camera

templates.name: Comet Trails
templates.description: Move and your motion smears across the wall as glowing comet tails. Still pins fade back to rest, so only movement leaves marks.

stickies.text: Velocity: how fast depth changes at this pin
Trail is per-pin memory - it rents one state slot each
Same energy feeds size and tint - wave your arm slowly

templates.name: Echo Chamber
templates.description: Every drum hit freezes a ghost copy of your pose and replays it behind the live one. Crossfade between now and the echoes.

stickies.text: Echo stores whole-frame snapshots per pin
Trigger port fires on drum onsets, not volume
Mix crossfades two depth fields like a DJ fader
Strike a pose right on the beat

templates.name: Velocity Paint
templates.description: Fast movement paints hot colors, stillness stays cool. Lag smooths the sensor jitter so strokes feel like brushwork.

stickies.text: Fast pins go hot, still pins stay cool
Lag filters jittery sensor motion into strokes
Move slow, then flick - watch the palette jump

templates.name: Ripple Tank
templates.description: Two touch-driven ripples spread across the pin field and interfere like water in a tank. Drag both pads and hunt for moire patterns.

stickies.text: Two ripples add - instant interference patterns
Analytic rings: pure distance math, no water sim
Wave height also drives color - crests glow

templates.name: Arm Fire
templates.description: Flames of flickering pins ignite only along your arms while the rest of you stays calm. Raise them slowly and conduct the fire.

stickies.text: Soft mask: 1 on your arm, 0 everywhere else
Multiply is a stencil - flicker only where the mask is hot
Wander drifts per pin - cheapest fire in town
One energy field drives size AND color

templates.name: Hand Magnet
templates.description: Your open palm blasts pins away, a closed fist sucks them back in. A spring gives every pin mass so it overshoots and settles.

stickies.text: 21 joints tracked - this uses the palm center
Remap makes openness bipolar: fist pulls, palm pushes
Spring adds mass - pins overshoot then settle
Force is strongest near your hand, fading with distance

templates.name: Head Spotlight
templates.description: A single spotlight tracks your head across the pin wall, casting real shadows into the relief. Step sideways and the light follows.

stickies.text: Joint is one tracked point - its z comes from depth
Unlit pins ignore lights - switch material to lit
Only one light gets the cheap shadow map - this one
Vignette pulls eyes into the beam

templates.name: Silhouette Cut
templates.description: Every pin outside your body retracts into the wall, leaving a floating silhouette painted in live camera color. You become a cutout made of pins.

stickies.text: Background mask is 1 off-body - invert it to keep YOU
Size 0 means the pin retracts into the wall
video-color paints each pin its own camera pixel
Feather the edge so the cutout breathes

templates.name: Beat Strobe
templates.description: Every kick slams pin size and bloom with a shaped flash, while a counter steps the hue one notch per hit. Twelve beats walks the full rainbow.

stickies.text: Envelope shapes a click into attack and decay
Counter steps hue per hit - 12 beats, full rainbow
One envelope, two destinations: size and bloom
Onsets fire on transients, not loudness

templates.name: EQ Terrain
templates.description: The grid splits into three columns and each one becomes a giant EQ bar driven by its own FFT band. Bass heaves the left, highs shimmer the right.

stickies.text: 20 FFT bands - pick which one owns each zone
Region mask here is a grid column, not a body part
Multiply gates the band into its zone, add stacks zones
Blend zone edges so bars melt into each other

templates.name: MIDI Rig
templates.description: Three CC knobs grab depth, size, and hue while any note fires a shockwave ring across the wall. Plug in a controller over USB, network, or BLE and play the pins.

stickies.text: Any CC can grab any port - tap a knob to MIDI-learn
Notes are triggers - velocity rides along free
Shockwave: one expanding ring per hit, pure math
Add stacks the ring on top of camera depth

templates.name: BPM Sculpt
templates.description: A step sequencer locked to the global BPM morphs every pin between two shapes on the beat. Slew turns the steps into liquid glides.

stickies.text: Morph is a 0-1 lerp - meshes share vertex order
Sequencer steps on the global BPM - tap tempo up top
Slew turns stairs into ramps
A bar-synced LFO keeps the spin musical

templates.name: Feedback Bloom
templates.description: Beat-frozen echoes smear through a trail and detonate in bloom, so the wall feels like it remembers everything you did. A slow hue drift sells the feedback illusion.

stickies.text: Echo then trail: snapshots that smear - feedback with no neighbors
Each stateful node rents floats per pin - watch the budget
Bloom blows out only the brightest pins
Glacial hue drift makes the memory feel alive

templates.name: Kick Shatter
templates.description: Every kick drum blasts the pins apart like shrapnel, and a spring drags each one home so your image self-heals. The debris is tinted by how fast it flies.

stickies.text: Scatter throws each pin on its own hashed vector
Spring pulls every pin home - the image self-heals
Velocity tints the shrapnel while it flies
Low damping for jelly, high for snap

templates.name: Face Swarm
templates.description: The pins that make up your face dissolve into a drifting swarm, then a spring herds them back into your features. Everything is per-pin math - no flocking, and it still swarms.

stickies.text: 76 landmarks build this soft face mask
Wander is per-pin noise - no neighbors, still swarms
Mask gates the force: only face pins fly
Spring herds the swarm back into your face

templates.name: Pin Mosaic
templates.description: A few thousand fat discs sample the camera, posterize its colors, and tilt on seeded random angles for a hand-laid tile look. Drop the count and the portrait turns into abstract print.

stickies.text: Quantize snaps every color to N steps - instant print look
Random is a hash: same seed, same mosaic forever
Fewer, bigger pins read as tiles, not pixels
Try slab or tube tiles for parquet
